title: CrazyDifficulty
description: CrazyDifficulty is a plugin made for new challenges which makes the game more hard
body:
**CrazyDifficulty** is a plugin made for new challenges which makes the game more hard.

config.yml:
```
message:
   reload:
   -  "&6CrazyDifficulty's &2Config Reloaded succesfully"
   
opbow:
  ARROW_FIRE: 1
  ARROW_DAMAGE: 8
  ARROW_KNOCKBACK: 100

opsword:    
  KNOCKBACK: 100
  FIRE_ASPECT: 1
  DAMAGE_ALL: 7
```

* it is customizable allowing you to change the levels of the swords and bows's enchantments

* **Zombies**:
Spawns with full netherite armor and sword with the enchantments of :


KNOCKBACK: 100
FIRE ASPECT: 1
SHARPNESS: 7
which is basically too OP.

* **Skeleton**:
Spawns with full netherite armor and sword with the enchantments of :


FLAME: 1
POWER: 8
PUNCH: 100

* **Creeper(Aww man)**:
Spawns in the state of charged which can kill you easily.

* *Commands**:
/crazydifficulty-reload
: reloads plugins config.



<details>
<summary>IF BUGS</summary>

I made this plugin within a day so if there is some bugs kindly report it

</details>
